content.full_text:
February 22, 1991

John Rothman  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 "J" Street, Suite 600  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Rothman:

This letter is confirming our telephone conversation following up on your letter regarding whether a City Council member may use campaign funds to purchase a ticket to another candidate's campaign dinner.

In the example we discussed the term "Legislative Official" is defined as "any employee or consultant of the Legislature whose duties are not solely secretarial, clerical or manual." You indicated that in the context of your letter "Legislative Official" refers to an incumbent or candidate for the State Senate or Assembly.

Please advise me if this information is not correct so we can provide it to our City Council.

Thank you again for your assistance.

Very truly yours,

Elizabeth G. Clark  
Senior Deputy City Attorney
